overview.description: The PGIM Nasdaq-100 Buffer 12 ETF - July (PQJL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on the Invesco QQQ Trust over a specific holdings period. The actively managed fund holds FLEX options. PQJL was launched on Dec 27, 2024 and is issued by PGIM.
